title: Uncraftable Blaystones
description: A mod that makes every item from Blay's Waystones uncraftable.
body:
![Uncraftable Blaystones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/effb3a9e7b875ec9ad39ccba73dfa0a91ba80941.png)

## Description
Do you love [Blay's Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones), but only want the feature of generated waystones?  This is a small mod that makes all craftable items from Blay's Waystones uncraftable, limiting functionality and making waystones feel more special when they are found.

### Features:
- All crafting recipes from Blay's Waystones removed
- Does not remove any items
- Requires [Blay's Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) to be installed

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
